title: Prometheus OOMs due to high cardinality metrics
symptoms: Prometheus pod restarts with OOMKilled every few hours
root_cause: A service exposes a label containing request_id or user_id
Recording rules generate an explosion of series
Prometheus retention increased without scaling memory
diagnosis: Container memory usage in Grafana → Prometheus dashboard
fix: Drop the offending label via relabel_config:
Deploy a remote-write tiered setup (Thanos/Mimir) for long retention
Restart Prometheus after applying the scrape config
prevention: Lint metrics in CI using promtool and a cardinality budget
Add an alert when head_series grows > 20% week-over-week
Enforce a label naming guide in the platform handbook

title: Elasticsearch cluster stuck in yellow after node replacement
root_cause: New node added with a different attribute (zone) breaking awareness rules
Disk watermark exceeded on one node and shards cannot allocate back
Total shards per node limit reached
fix: Raise the watermark temporarily so recovery can proceed:
Re-route the stuck shard manually if needed:
prevention: Automate node attribute labelling via user data
Track shard-to-node ratio and rebalance before maintenance
Use ILM to keep shards below 50GB each

title: Prometheus failing to scrape metrics from targets
symptoms: Prometheus UI showing targets as down
No metrics data for specific services
Metrics gaps in time series data
root_cause: Target endpoint not reachable from Prometheus
Scrape interval too short causing timeouts
TLS certificate issues with HTTPS targets
diagnosis: Check Prometheus targets page for scrape status
Review Prometheus logs for scrape errors
Test target endpoint accessibility from Prometheus
fix: Fix network connectivity between Prometheus and targets
Fix service discovery configuration or use static targets
prevention: Monitor scrape success rate and set up alerts
Test target endpoints before adding to Prometheus
Use appropriate scrape intervals for different targets

title: Grafana dashboards loading slowly or timing out
symptoms: Dashboard panels taking long time to load
Browser showing slow dashboard load times
High CPU/memory usage on Grafana server
root_cause: Complex queries with large time ranges
Too many panels on single dashboard
diagnosis: Review query inspector for slow queries
fix: Optimize dashboard queries with better time ranges
Reduce number of panels or split into multiple dashboards

title: Logstash pipeline blocked causing log processing delays
symptoms: Logs not appearing in Elasticsearch with delay
root_cause: Logstash filters too complex causing processing delays
Network issues between Logstash and Elasticsearch
fix: Increase worker threads and batch sizes
prevention: Monitor pipeline metrics and queue sizes
Right-size Logstash based on log volume

title: Kibana unable to connect to Elasticsearch cluster
symptoms: Kibana showing 'Kibana server is not ready' error
root_cause: Incorrect Elasticsearch URL in Kibana configuration
diagnosis: Check Kibana logs for connection errors
Test Elasticsearch connectivity from Kibana host
fix: Update Kibana configuration with correct Elasticsearch URL
Upgrade Kibana to match Elasticsearch version
prevention: Set up alerts for Kibana-Elasticsearch connectivity

title: Filebeat not sending logs due to registry file corruption
diagnosis: Check Filebeat logs for registry errors
Check disk space on Filebeat host
fix: Stop Filebeat and remove corrupted registry file
prevention: Use appropriate disk space for registry

title: Prometheus TSDB running out of disk space
symptoms: TSDB storage full errors in logs
root_cause: Retention period too long for available disk
High cardinality metrics consuming excessive space
diagnosis: Monitor disk usage on Prometheus host
fix: Reduce retention period in Prometheus configuration
Add more disk space to Prometheus host
Implement remote storage for long-term retention
prevention: Monitor disk usage and set alerts
Consider remote storage for large metric volumes

title: Fluentd buffer overflow causing log loss
root_cause: Buffer size too small for log volume
diagnosis: Check Fluentd logs for buffer errors
fix: Increase buffer size in Fluentd configuration
prevention: Monitor buffer usage and set alerts
Right-size buffers based on log volume

title: Elasticsearch index creation failing due to mapping errors
root_cause: Dynamic mapping creating wrong field types
fix: Update index mapping to correct field types
Disable dynamic mapping or use strict mapping
